text: Daniel says he left OpenAI and the Codex team to build Blackstar, a new hardware company for future human-computer interaction. He frames software and app-building as solved, argues the next improvement in human-AI communication requires changing OS and hardware, says Blackstar is building a new device, and announces a $12m seed round led by AbstractVC with participation from Naval, SV Angel, Chapter One, Timeless, and other angels.
David Cramer says the Blackstar demo was pretty good, quoting Daniel's Blackstar launch post.
Daniel says Blackstar is an in-person team of eight across San Francisco and Shenzhen, hiring across hardware, software, and model training, with applications through blackstar.inc/careers or DMs.
Sam Altman announces a Codex app launch promotion: paid-plan rate limits doubled for two months and free/go access added. Daniel retweeted it, preserving his connection to Codex launch distribution.
